title: docker-osint-stack: A single-command Docker Compose OSINT collection environment with audit logging and encrypted export
description:
A reproducible Docker Compose stack bundling SpiderFoot v4.0 (passive reconnaissance), theHarvester 4.10.1 (subdomain and email enumeration), a PostgreSQL 16 audit-log database, and an Nginx 1.27 reverse proxy. The stack ships with four investigation workflow templates (domain reconnaissance, social media OSINT, credential exposure, custom blank template), a secure teardown.sh that stops containers, removes volumes, and shreds logs, and an export_findings.sh that GPG-encrypts a pg_dump of the audit log. All Dockerfiles are hadolint-clean; both custom images are scanned with Trivy and Dockle; raw scan outputs and live boot measurements are committed under results/ so every claim in the README is reproducible.

The README serves as the methodology document for this artefact. No separate paper accompanies this release.
